task: Advanced high-value task: Construction Robotics Room Validation Protocol Draft. Scenario: a high-value system is approaching an engineering gate and the owner needs a defensible go/no-go packet for construction robotics room. Embedded packet: Records: R1 doorway_m=64 obstacle_count=96 floor_slope_pct=3; R2 doorway_m=73 obstacle_count=92 floor_slope_pct=6; R3 doorway_m=59 obstacle_count=107 floor_slope_pct=2. Remediation options: O1 changes doorway_m by -12% cost=89000; O2 changes obstacle_count by -18% cost=103800; O3 changes floor_slope_pct by -25% cost=62200; max_budget=129600. Rules and constraints: robot requires doorway>=0.85m, obstacles<=5, slope<=2%; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: write a specialist-facing memo that distinguishes calculation results, assumptions, missing inputs, and expert-review questions. Deliver robotics_layout_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
